      protected int procedure(AbstractNField dfhcommarea) throws ContextException
      Description copied from class: AbstractOnlineProgram
      Abstract method that must be implemented by subclasses to define specific transaction logic.
      Specified by:
      procedure in class AbstractOnlineProgram
      Parameters:
      dfhcommarea - the transaction COMMAREA
      Returns:
      the exit code for the transaction
      Throws:
